tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
    edit 30
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-dns"
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action deny
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
    next
    move 30 before 10
    move 10 before 100
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     edit 30
new entry '30' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-dns"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set srcaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #         set service "DNS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (30) #     next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 30 before 10

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #     move 10 before 100

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 20
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-dns-exfil"
        set uuid d838c2e8-32af-51f1-0b4c-80c86041ac3e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS-8853"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 30
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-deny-dns"
        set uuid 06813572-32b0-51f1-eccf-dc3d801685c5
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "DNS"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
    edit 10
set name "LAN-to-WAN-allow-web-only"
        set uuid fa9e802a-32af-51f1-77a6-3b2cfde6479e
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
